name: learning-brain
description: Evidence-grounded learning design — 32 research-backed tools plus workflow discipline for designing courses, modules, objectives, MCQs, assessments, audits, and live sessions. Pairs the Learning Brain MCP with a skill that enforces elicit-first, audit-always orchestration.

api_key.title: Learning Brain API key
api_key.description: Get one at https://learningbrain.ai/#connect — enter the same email each time to retrieve your existing key.
